message: Node started: Task: Write a Python script (main.py) to solve an optimization problem. Input: N (board size, 9x9), M (number of 3x3 stamps, 20), K (max placements, 81). An initial 9x9 board of integers. M different 3x3 stamps. Objective: Place up to K stamps on the board. Each placement is defined by (stamp_index m, top-left position i, j). When a stamp is placed, its values are added to the corresponding board cells modulo 998244353. Maximize the sum of all final board entries. Output Format: Line 1: L (number of placements, 0 <= L <= K). Next L lines: m i j (stamp index, top-left row, top-left column). Constraints: Board is 9x9. Stamps are 3x3. All placements must keep the 3x3 stamp within the 9x9 board boundaries. Modulo arithmetic (998244353) applies to cell values during addition. Goal: Implement an algorithm (e.g., greedy, hill climbing, or simulated annealing) to find a sequence of placements that maximizes the sum of the final board values. A valid baseline is to output 0 (no placements).
